State.Author: TheOGTennessee
State.Description: This is the whole shebang. This mod unlocks Class M parts, balances their mass and hull, fixes errors in their entries, and fixes the snap points on the hull and structure objects! This is the one stop shop for making Class M ships in Starfield.
State.Name: TN's Class M (and Starborn Guardian) Ship Building

State.Author: The Unofficial Patch Project Team
State.Description: A comprehensive bugfixing mod for Starfield. The goal of the Unofficial Starfield Patch (aka USFP) is to eventually fix every bug with Starfield not officially resolved by the developers to the limits of the Creation Kit and community-developed tools, in one easy-to-install package.
State.Name: Unofficial Starfield Patch - USFP

State.Author: Archost
State.Description: Use disk cache for IO for less disk activity. - SFSE and ASI plugin.
State.Name: Disk Cache Enabler

State.Author: keanuWheeze
State.Description: Lets you permanently change the FOV In-Game, so that you can immediately see if it looks right.
State.Name: In-Game FOV Changer

State.Author: A100N vito74m
State.Description:
STARFIELD performance BOOST!

Perfect for DLSS and FSR!
State.Name: Starfield Performance BOOST

State.Author: m8r98a4f2
State.Description: StarUI Inventory improves all inventory screens for use on a PC. Compact display style. More details in sortable columns. Item tag icons. Category as left sidebar. Many quality of life features!
State.Name: StarUI Inventory

State.Author: m8r98a4f2
State.Description: StarUI Ship Builder improves the ship builder for usage on PC. Compact style, sort-able columns, filter panel, category list, variant list, vertical upgrade list and many more Quality-of-Life additions.
State.Name: StarUI Ship Builder

State.Author: Seb263
State.Description: This mod's goal is to significantly improve the user experience by enhancing the responsiveness and efficiency of in-game menus.
State.Name: Undelayed Menus

State.Author: Weijiesen - Team EVE
State.Description: Every last visual effect in Starfield remade and improved. *NOT Ai UPSCALE!!!* This will enhance your game in a big way. Muzzleflashes, storms, blood, explosions, lasers, and everything else.
State.Name: EXE - Effect Textures Enhanced

State.Author: checker90
State.Description: This SFSE plugin launches Starfield with optimized CPU performance for smoother gameplay, especially in heavily modded setups.
State.Name: Starfield High Priority Launcher

State.Author: m8r98a4f2
State.Description: StarUI HUD gives you full control over most HUD widgets and provides an updated loot list and better item cards with DPS and V/W. Resize, move, recolour or disable most of the HUD widgets. The loot list can show additional columns like V/W (sort-able) and show you the item card for hovered items!
State.Name: StarUI HUD

State.Description:
Overhauls the neutral body proportions for females.



Update 1.2c: FOMOD is now compatible with both MO2 and Vortex, simply select the corresponding mod manager during the first installation step.
